Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User account exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to LoginActivity
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click on sign-in button

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User account exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to LoginActivity
2. Enter invalid email and password
3. Click on sign-in button
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating incorrect credentials

Title: User creates a new family successfully
Preconditions: User logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to JoinFamilyActivity
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Submit form
Expected Result: Family created and user redirected to FamilyActivity

Title: User fails to create a family due to missing mandatory fields
Preconditions: User logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to JoinFamilyActivity
2. Leave one or more mandatory fields empty
3. Attempt to submit form

Title: User manages an existing family
Preconditions: User logged in and family created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to FamilyActivity
2. Perform any management action (e.g., edit family details)
3. Save changes

Title: User attempts to manage a non-existent family
Preconditions: User logged in but no family created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to FamilyActivity
2. Attempt to perform management action
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating no family exists

Title: User navigates to HomeActivity
Preconditions: User logged in and family created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to HomeActivity
2. Verify presence of HomeFragment, MonitorFragment, and NoteFragment
Expected Result: HomeActivity displays correctly with all fragments visible

Title: User accesses footer menu and navigates to Monitoring section
Preconditions: User logged in and family created
Test Steps:
1. Access footer menu
2. Select Monitoring section

Title: User accesses footer menu and navigates to Notes section
Preconditions: User logged in and family created
Test Steps:
1. Access footer menu
2. Select Monitoring section
3. From Monitoring section, select Notes

Title: User accesses footer menu and returns to Home page
Preconditions: User logged in and family created
Test Steps:
1. Access footer menu
2. Select Monitoring section
3. From Monitoring section, select Notes
4. From Notes section, return to Home page

Title: User accesses footer menu and navigates to Profile section
Preconditions: User logged in and family created
Test Steps:
1. Access footer menu
2. Select Profile section

Title: User accesses footer menu and navigates back to footer menu
Preconditions: User logged in and family created
Test Steps:
1. Access footer menu
2. Select Monitoring section
3. From Monitoring section, select Notes
4. From Notes section, return to Home page
5. From Home page, access footer menu again
Expected Result: User redirected back to footer menu

Title: User abandons the current session
Preconditions: User logged in and family created
Test Steps:

2. Click on Abbandona
3. Enter valid user ID and GoogleSignInClient
4. Confirm abandonment
Expected Result: User session abandoned and redirected to LoginActivity
